title: Adventures of Petey and Friends
original_title: The Adventures of Petey and Friends
overview: Desert Sky Air Force Base is instructed to carry out an urgent mission. Petey, a new fighter plane, arrives by forced landing. Petey is determined to carry out the most important task by himself and rescue his best friend.
